summary: Iteration 40 - Data Quality & Team Name Fix Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified. Major fixes confirmed: 1) Team names no longer swapped (DC shows Delhi Capitals, not SRH). 2) Completed matches have real scores (r > 0). 3) AI Commentary displays full Hinglish commentary with Match Story, Phase Analysis, Timeline, MVPs. 4) Points table shows RCB (not RCBW). 5) Virat Kohli shows 9.6 rating as top MVP.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: _auto_sync_ipl_schedule uses teamInfo[] as source of truth (not teams[]) to prevent name/short mismatch
Backend: Phase 2 score fetching from match_scorecard API for completed matches with zero scores
Backend: AI commentary generates structured data with match_pulse, key_moments, star_performers, verdict
Backend: Points table normalizes RCBW→RCB via _get_short_name()
Frontend: AICommentaryTab.jsx has 4 tabs (Match Story, Phase Analysis, Timeline, MVPs)
Frontend: HomePage.jsx uses getTeamScore() with inning name matching for correct score-team mapping
Frontend: normalizeTeam() handles RCBW→RCB, PK→PBKS, SH→SRH aliases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified the major data quality fixes. Key verified features: 1) 3 completed IPL matches with REAL scores: RCB vs SRH (RCB won by 6 wkts, 201/9 vs 203/4), KKR vs MI (MI won by 6 wkts, 220/4 vs 224/4), CSK vs RR (RR won by 8 wkts, 127/10 vs 128/2). 2) Team names match short_names (no swaps like DC showing SRH name). 3) AI Commentary has 4 tabs: Match Story (headline + sub), Phase Analysis (Powerplay/Middle/Death with stats), Timeline (16 key moments with overs), MVPs (Virat Kohli 9.6, Devdutt Padikkal 9.4, Ishan Kishan 9.2). 4) Points table shows RCB not RCBW. 5) Scorecard shows full batting/bowling data with 11 batsmen per innings. 6) Hinglish text in commentary (e.g., 'Kya timing hai!', 'Dhamakedar!'). No JS console errors.

backend_apis.GET /api/matches/{id}/ai-commentary: PASSED - Returns match_pulse, key_moments (16), star_performers (4), verdict
backend_apis.GET /api/cricket/ipl/points-table: PASSED - Returns 10 teams with RCB (not RCBW)
backend_apis.Team name consistency: PASSED - No team name swaps detected (DC shows Delhi Capitals, not SRH)

frontend_features.completed_match_scores: PASSED - RCB 201/9 vs SRH 203/4 displayed correctly
frontend_features.ai_commentary_match_story: PASSED - 'Kohli-Padikkal chase: Chinnaswamy on fire!' with Hinglish text

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue_1: Team names were SWAPPED (e.g., DC name showed SRH)
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_1: teams[] and teamInfo[] arrays in CricketData.org API can be in different orders. Code was using teams[0] for team_a name but teamInfo[0] for team_a short_name, causing mismatches.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied_1: Use teamInfo[] as single source of truth for both name and short_name in _auto_sync_ipl_schedule() and sync_ipl_schedule()
rca_of_the_issue.original_issue_2: Scores were zeros for completed matches
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_2: series_info API doesn't return scores for completed matches. Only live matches have scores in the matchList.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied_2: Added Phase 2 in _auto_sync_ipl_schedule() that fetches scores from match_scorecard API for completed matches with zero scores
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_3: Live tab wasn't being clicked in previous tests. AI commentary was working but not being accessed.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied_3: Verified AI commentary works when Live tab is clicked. Shows full 4-tab commentary with Match Story, Phase Analysis, Timeline, MVPs
